title: Ring O' Roses
content:
Ring a ring o' roses,
    A pocket full of posies;
Hush! hush! hush!
    And we all tumble down.
meaning:
Leonard Leslie Brooke's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Ring O' Roses"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
